LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MGMT, LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTION OF PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE HOUSING COURT, TO BE HEARD ON APRIL 11, 2013 AT 9:30 AM. MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPERATIVE PLEADING PER LOCAL RULE 2.6C, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 11, 2013 AT 4:00 PM. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MGMT, LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTION OF PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION RAISES AN ISSUE OF FACT THAT IS PREMATURE AT THIS STATE OF LITIGATION. ADDITIONALLY, THE CONTRACT AND ALL LIMITATIONS CONTAINED THEREIN IS ATTACHED TO THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINED AND INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Set For Trial On Nov-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Mtn To Strike Portion Of Pltf'S 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. John Bradley of Law Offices of Vernon Bradley (415-331-4441) appear for plaintiff Kelly Ensign opposing party.
Atty. gumpal Patel of Prindle, amaro, Goetz, hillyard, Barnes & reinholtz (562-436-3946) appear via courcall for defendant Equity Residential moving party.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MGMT, LLC's Motion To Strike Portion Of Plaintiff'S 1st Amended Complaint is DENIED. Defendant's motion raises an issue of fact that is premature at this state of litigation. Additionally, the contract and all limitations contained therein is attached to the First Amended Complained and incorporated by reference. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge A. James Robertson, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/AJR)

Mtn To Strike Portion Of Pltf'S 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Continued To Apr-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MGMT, LLC's Motion To Strike Portion Of Plaintiff's 1st Amended Complaint is transferred to Department 501, the Housing Court, to be heard on April 11, 2013 at 9:30 am. Moving party shall provide courtesy copies of the operative pleading per Local Rule 2.6C, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 11, 2013 at 4:00 pm. Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
